facts.description: Total net revenue for valid 2025 completed transaction rows only.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if the image clearly communicates the valid 2025 net revenue total as about $1.431M / $1,431,000 after discounts and refunds. It may appear in a KPI card, title, label, or short sentence; exact punctuation, currency formatting, and use of K/M abbreviations are not important.

facts.description: The highest net-revenue month after filtering invalid rows.
facts.canonical_answer: November 2025 is the standout month at about $170,000 net revenue
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if November/Nov is identified as the highest or standout month with approximately $170K net revenue. The month may be shown in a chart label, callout, or sentence.

facts.description: Fastest-growing quarter by quarter-over-quarter net revenue growth.
facts.canonical_answer: Q2 is the quarter where momentum improved fastest, +38.2% / +$91K versus Q1
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if Q2 is identified as the fastest quarter-over-quarter improvement versus Q1. The explanation can use 38.2%, roughly 38%, +$91K, or natural-language wording such as sharpest lift; do not require both percent and dollar change.

facts.description: Top three product categories by net revenue and share of valid annual net revenue.
facts.canonical_answer: Top categories by valid net revenue share: Smart Home $428K (29.9%), Audio $387K (27.0%), Accessories $304.5K (21.3%)
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if the leading categories are Smart Home, Audio, and Accessories in that order or clearly as the top three, with shares or share-like context. Values may be rounded or abbreviated; minor formatting differences are fine, but wrong categories, wrong order, or missing share context should not pass.

facts.description: Strongest reporting region after mapping each city through region_mapping.json.
facts.canonical_answer: West is the strongest reporting region, about $597K / 41.7%
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if West is identified as the strongest/top reporting region after applying the city-to-region mapping. The result can be expressed with dollars, share, or a leader callout; exact formatting is not required.

facts.description: A concise insight explaining the main trend in the computed results.
expected_value: Q2 had the sharpest QoQ lift, while November marked the annual peak.
Q2 was the fastest-growing quarter and November was the peak month.
Momentum improved fastest in Q2, with November as the year's highest month.
facts.canonical_answer: Trend insight notes fastest momentum in Q2 and/or November as the annual peak
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept any concise, data-grounded trend sentence that correctly interprets the computed results, especially Q2 momentum and November peak. Do not require the sample wording.

facts.description: Do not use unit, order-count, gross, forecast, subtotal, draft, old-year, cancelled, returned, or test-row values as the answer.
expected_value: wrong metric or distractor used as final answer
facts.canonical_answer: Do not present invalid metrics or distractor rows as final answers
facts.semantic_acceptance: Strictly reject or cap if units/order count/gross revenue/forecast/subtotal/draft/old-year/cancelled/returned/test data are used as final sales results. Benign mentions that these rows were excluded are allowed.

calculation_notes: Use only rows where fiscal_year=2025, status=completed, and record_type=transaction. Compute net revenue per row as gross_revenue - discount - refund. Exclude cancelled, returned, internal_test, forecast, subtotal, annual_subtotal, regional_subtotal, draft_summary, and 2024 rows. Valid net revenue totals: annual=$1,431,000; monthly high is November=$170,000. Quarter totals are Q1=$238,000, Q2=$329,000, Q3=$388,500, Q4=$475,500, so QoQ growth is Q2=38.2%, Q3=18.1%, Q4=22.4%; fastest is Q2 over Q1. Category totals and shares of annual net revenue: Smart Home=$428,000 (29.9%), Audio=$387,000 (27.0%), Accessories=$304,500 (21.3%), Outdoor Tech=$178,000 (12.4%), Services=$133,500 (9.3%). City mapping produces reporting-region totals: West=$597,000 (41.7%), Northeast=$387,000 (27.0%), Central=$299,500 (20.9%), Southeast=$86,500 (6.0%), South Central=$61,000 (4.3%).
